description_long: This sculpture depicts three human figures, likely children, seated closely together on a curved, log-like bench. The figures are rendered in a realistic yet slightly stylized manner, with detailed facial features and textured hair. Their postures suggest a sense of intimacy and shared focus, as they all appear to be looking down at or interacting with something in their laps. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular stone or concrete base, bordered by a strip of green foliage. The surface of the figures has a weathered, bluish-green patina, typical of aged bronze. A small plaque is visible on the base in front of the figures, indicating some form of dedication or information.
description: A weathered bronze sculpture of three children seated together on a curved bench, mounted on a stone base with a visible plaque and green border.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three children seated closely, all looking down at their laps, with the plaque clearly visible on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the figures and the curvature of the bench, with the figures' postures and interaction more apparent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the three figures and the full arc of the bench, with less detail visible on their faces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the figures from another profile, with the bench's end and the plaque on the base visible.
attribute_subject_matter: three children seated together on a bench
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a paved or stone base, surrounded by a border of green foliage, suggesting a park or landscaped urban area.
